title: Exporting Dashboards = Blurry PDFs
excerpt: Whenever I export my dashboard to a PDF the charts come out blurry and it is difficult to read. I tried to save it as a PDV via the Print Dashboard button instead, and the charts are not blurry when I do that, but the ma…

posts.author: user.name (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Whenever I export my dashboard to a PDF the charts come out blurry and it is difficult to read. I tried to save it as a PDV via the Print Dashboard button instead, and the charts are not blurry when I do that, but the margins are off and the charts get cut off. Is anyone else experiencing this or have any ideas about what I can do? Thank you.

posts.author: biograf (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: Dear user.name can you please explain where I can find the Print Dashboard button?

posts.author: user.name (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: In the upper right hand corner on desktop click the blue “share” button.
